review_text: Beautiful camping spot conveniently located!

We stopped here for a week on our way up north. The sites are spacious, much bigger than most parks, well maintained and pet friendly. The staff are welcoming and the setting is just beautiful. Highly recommend for a relaxing getaway!
dont stay here epically the workers rooms mattresses never been changed soo bad

very nice. stayed here for 8 days. Happy. Easy drive to Airlie beach. Located on highway Carefull when exiting or entering park.  Entry and exit separate way. very well maintained swimming pool. If you have caravan pick up caravan leg small plank from BBQ shed for levelling your caravan, Make sure to return it. very peacefull park.

Was going to stay 2 weeks. But left after 1 week. For the amount of money I paid, u would expect the toilets to be cleaned everyday but they weren't. No toilet paper for 4 days and bins over flowing. No information in advance that the water was going to turned off during the whole day for days.
Office hours are 3 days a week only.

Booked via phone but when we arrived they couldn’t find our booking, but they got us checked in its s good overnight stop. Facilities were good. Noisy as it’s on the A1 but we knew that when we booked
Good caravan park

This is a really neat caravan park. Yes it’s out of Proserpine town by about 5 minutes & it is on the Bruce Hwy & can get noisy up until 8ish pm.
But… the amenities are clean, dated but clean.
The pool looked so inviting, but I didn’t go in it!!
The eatery area was clean & tidy.
The sites are a good size & ours backed onto the cane fields which I loved. The sound of the trains chugging along was calming.
I would recommend staying at Gunna Go.
Doggo friendly. Nice grassy lots
Great stop! We were very surprised with this overnight stop. Has everything you need plus a bar and grill.

Booked in for one night on caravan site, ended up staying two, even though near highway was very quiet. Went to their pub first night had fish and chips which was beautiful, went back next night had chicken parmi was also beautiful, highly recommend this park staff were very friendly very tidy and clean

Clean amenities and well located with an easy drive to Airlie beach while being out of the hustle and bustle. The bar and restaurant is a great touch for when you don’t feel like cooking or fancy a chat - Alan was super friendly and shared some recommendations for areas to stop at on our drive down the coast.

We arrived a little late but Wayne was just an absolute legend by greeting us and making us feel welcome, just an all round fantastic bloke.
Onnya Wayne 👍👍🤠
Great park, very clean and quiet even on the main hwy. licensed bar on site with free sausage sizzle for guests on Friday nights with a food truck for other nights. Will definitely stay here again.

I was in a van on a nice grassy site. All good.
My friend who paid $140 a night for 2 nights in a cabin was not so impressed. The room was very small. The toaster did not work, the air conditioner was noisy as was the road out front. The room was not serviced on the second day so she ran out of coffee and tea.
An absolutely lovely extremely clean park, pet friendly. Amenities spotless.  Drinks at the in-house pub at 5👍😀

Camp sites were level and large friendly staff and had sausage sizzle and open the licence bar onsite Friday night
Nice pool and facilities are clean and looked after
A half way stop for me from Bundy to the Tablelands. My pooch is welcome,  and Mick at the bar will.make you feel welcome while April cooks up a feed. Highly recommend the calamari.
Nice bushland setting amongst the cane fields
Love staying here. Friendly staff. Clean facilities. Sites are a good size and our large van fits perfectly.

Overall, an OK stay.  Basic amenities  block. We felt that the amenities were not cleaned daily, which was disappointing.  |We did love the bar and the meals to buy were great. |We probably won't stay again, the sites are so far from amenities. Lighting and safety at night absolutely needs to be improved,  my husband tripped and injured himself, over a rock path leading to the amenities, in the middle of the night. Torchlight was not enough to light the way.
LOVELY STAFF, great place for watching cane trains in action and even watched cane being harvested

Great place to stop.. we just spent 3 months there, unfortunately had to leave today.. Lovely owners and staff, very welcoming safe happy tourist park..
Very clean and tidy
Definitely be stopping in again on our way back down from up north...
Nice clean, friendly and happy staff and great coffee!!!!

Friendly helpful managers, green spacious parking for motorhome or caravan, large entertainment area with a bar & pool & amenities provided everything we needed.We enjoyed 3 nights & would have loved to stayed longer. Great value. Thank you!
2 Travelling Hats

This park suited us fine as we had to leave our van for three days at the park. We felt safe leaving it. Neat and tidy park with spotless amenities. Sorry we couldn’t attend the sausage sizzles night.
Great little park. Great facilities and friendly staff.

We have been caravanning for many years and have not previously been pushed to the point of posting a bad review until now.|We regularly travel between Rockhampton and Cairns and thought we had found a little gem in this park.  While the amenities are fairly ordinary we have usually found them to be reasonably clean and the location is handy.  However, each time we have asked for a site large enough so that we don’t have to uncouple the car and van we have been assured this will be fine.  Not once have we been given our requested site and it’s the same story tonight.  We now have a saturated muddy site with no cement pad and when I enquired why I was told because of the rain other people needed to be moved from muddy sites and the site I had requested and already paid for was given to someone else.  Apparently it’s fine for us to paddle through the mud but not others.  Last straw we won’t be back.  We believe that everyone should be treated with courtesy and respect and unfortunately this has not been our experience at this park.
Stayed in a powered site with our van. Staff so welcoming, amenities clean and today and the grounds lovely.
Fantastic park enjoyed our stay lovely  owners will be back

Lovely holiday park
All staff are very friendly
Pet friendly
BBQ  swimming pool
Very neat an tidy
Lovely grounds beautiful plants
Very clean toilets an showers
Laundry  with washing machine and dryers
Nice quite relaxing place to come an stay
I am moving there with my puppies
They love walking around the grounds 🐶🐶💙💙💙💙

Get park and great price close to everything, amenities clean and great water pressure, and their own bar and sausage sizzle on Friday night. Why pay high prices in Airlie Beach and it's to busy their. Loved my stay would highly recommend
Great price and very clean.
The caravan park was very clean. The grounds are very green and kept in a very good condition.
Stayed on our caravan.grounds are beautiful,staff is lovely,amenities are great.quiet restful surrounds.always a high point in our travel stays
amenities are clean and owner is very friendly! We just stopped for a shower but would definitely stay overnight
Lovely people and staff

Friendly, welcoming staff and lovely, large shady sites. Amenities are old but clean and do what they need too! Yes, there are cane trains but its all part of the experience and we were very happy with our stay.

Had a one night stopover at Gunna Go this weekend...room was clean..adequate  and comfortable...BUT the experience  was "the BEST"   Had Jeremy Turner live with open bar from 4pm....sausage sizzle and a bonfire...kids playing in the background....everyone  joined in...it was an arewsome  family feel and definitely  worth the stop in.....great  operaters  and friendly  staff !!   Love Love this holiday Park.!  Cant wait to see what the new owners  ( 9mnths in )   will do for this Top Spot !!!
Love Carl and Pjay xxx
Softwash NQ.
Great caravan park fabulous amenities and onsite afternoon drinks and food was fantastic
Lovely place.  Close to cane train lines (seasonal) and road but not a problem at night.  Stage very friendly

Caravan stay. Going south entrance is there before you realise it can take you by surprise. Leaving park there is exit best to take exit than entry. 100 Koh zone Bit of concern pulling out with caravan. New owners of park. Really making effort but still a way to go.  Staff and check in top notch couldn’t fault friendly manner.  Bar area ( open 5pm) drinks reasonably priced. Owners threw a free BBQ one night at bar area. Swimming pool You can order meals from reception. Two lots ammenities one lot (upper caravan sites) ensuite type dated pop but clean. Other ones near pool also updated but clean Plenty water pressure. Laundry near pool. Some drive through sites no concrete slabs other drive through with concrete slab but be careful of tyres due to sharp edges. About 10 minutes from town Center. Only down side it can be a bit noisy with highway traffic and occasional cane train passing otherwise nice quiet park. Not much for kids to do other than swimming pool .Would I recommend to grey nomads Yes Would I stay again Yes
Fantastic park.have stayed there on regular basis
Fantastic park

Happy hour and food fabulous highly recommend fish burger and fish and chips. Free sausage sizzle Friday nights very popular. Excellent friendly, helpful staff. Pool and good amenities. Great stay. Surrounded by sugar cane. Surprised although on the highway didn't hear any highway noise. Will return.

What a beautiful hidden gem. We booked to stay 3 nights and ended up staying 5 (would have stayed longer but they were booked out).
The service was outstanding, we were made feel welcome from the moment we entered reception.
The park was maintained beautiful, everything within the park was clean and tidy.
Thank you for a wonderful stay,credit to management and staff.

Great caravan park. Located out of town so therefore very quiet. Cabin was good size and had everything we needed. The managers and other staff really friendly and helpful. The bar opens at 5pm and have a good selection of drinks. Good atmosphere too. You can order meals or snacks. They are cooked beautifully, reasonably priced and good serves. Thoroughly enjoyed our stay.
Great place, clean and tidy. Friendly and helpful people.
The managers were exceptional… I parked ina powered site but had no cord so they lent me a lamp from bunnings.

A lovely family run park.  Grounds and amenities well maintained.   Friendly service.   Beautiful gardens, lawn and trees.  They have an evening bar onsite with social activities throughout the week.   We'll be back.
